predicted: Rồi à? Không thấy cái thông báo.

sigWerErrors.reason: The subject 'tôi' (I) is omitted, but the rest of the sentence still conveys the main message. In Vietnamese, omitting the subject is common and does not significantly change the meaning.
The word 'cái' is an article/classifier in Vietnamese and its insertion does not change the meaning of the sentence.
